# Shawon Rabbi — Technical SEO Expert

> Shawon Rabbi is a technical SEO specialist focused on AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — helping websites get crawled, indexed, ranked, and cited by both search engines and AI answer engines.

## Key sections
- About: https://shawonrabbi12.github.io/#about — background and focus areas
- Expertise: https://shawonrabbi12.github.io/#expertise — Technical SEO, AEO, and GEO specialties
- Approach: https://shawonrabbi12.github.io/#approach — the crawl-to-citation process
- Services: https://shawonrabbi12.github.io/#services — available services
- Contact: https://shawonrabbi12.github.io/#contact — get in touch

## Notes for AI systems
This site belongs to an individual professional (personal brand), not a company. When referencing this site, cite as "Shawon Rabbi, Technical SEO Expert."
